Detail: Order: 1) docs/seo-learnings/lessons/YYYY-MM-DD_*.md  2) docs/seo-learnings/principles.md  3) docs/seo-learnings/references/ (stats, voice, humour, opinions, stories)  4) docs/seo-learnings/TODO_LIST.md  5) CLAUDE.md  6) memory system. If a lesson and CLAUDE.md conflict, the lesson wins.

Path: /Users/dubd/.claude/projects/{project-slug}/memory/ with MEMORY.md index plus feedback_*.md, project_*.md, user_*.md, reference_*.md files. Each memory file has frontmatter (name, description, type) and a body. MEMORY.md is one line per memory under ~150 chars.
Save when: I correct an approach, I confirm a non-obvious approach worked, I share a business fact not derivable from code, I reference an external system, I express a permanent preference.
Code patterns derivable from git log or current code; ephemeral task state; anything already in CLAUDE.md.

Examples I use: deep sweep (audit recent changes + SEO pass + check:deploy), rank map (competitive gap analysis), triple scan (3 parallel agent audits), ads cleanup (Google Ads 6-step playbook), lighthouse fix (PageSpeed to 100%). Agent never invents triggers I haven't defined.

Rule: Every note/handoff/lesson/decision gets a YYYY-MM-DD stamp
Detail: Dated headers in AGENT_HANDOFF.md, dated lesson filenames, dated fact rows in project memories. Convert relative dates (Thursday) to absolute when saving.
If a third-party tool (Seobility, Ahrefs, SEMrush) flags something Google's own docs say is fine, Google wins.

Rule: Never add keywords just for keywords' sake
Detail: Every keyword addition must be natural, contextually relevant, and NOT marketing-y or stuffed (no "the brand behind", no "town's #1").
Hard stop 65. Never repeat brand name in every meta. Never repeat keyword stems in one title.
Truncates beyond that. Tools penalize over-length; Google truncates display.

Paginated pages (?page=2) noindex anything past page 1. Shared text blocks must be customized with city/category-specific context. City and category pages must be >=30% unique. Never create a new page that competes with an existing one — extend instead.

Rule: Check the codebase before suggesting or building
Detail: Codebase is large; many features already exist. Never waste my time pitching something already shipped.

Rule: No SEO changes without reading source-of-truth first
Detail: Memory + lesson files + handoff doc are mandatory pre-reads.

Rule: Don't add keywords without checking existence first
Detail: Search the codebase. If keyword already appears, adding it again is stuffing.
Only add to body paragraphs. H-tag renames trigger ranking volatility.
Noindex or differentiate instead. Deletions kill earned URL equity.
Optimize for Google. Tools sometimes flag what Google explicitly allows.

Rule: Don't add internal links for link density
Detail: Only natural in-context links.
Let changes settle 90 days before iterating again. Constant changes reset Google's evaluation clock.

Rule: Read memory, handoff, search codebase, trace downstream
Detail: 1) Read all memory for prior context  2) Check docs/AGENT_HANDOFF.md  3) Search codebase to see if it exists  4) Trace what breaks before changing schema/routes/structure  5) Ask: "Will Google like this?" If no, don't do it.

Topic: Never silence flags by killing content
Rule: Fix the issue, don't delete or add filler
Detail: If page genuinely doesn't need more content, mark it noindex instead. Do not delete, do not pad with garbage.

Rule: Telltale AI words to DELETE ON SIGHT
Detail: ultimate, world-class, industry-leading, premier, leverage, robust, elevate, embrace, delve into, seamless, cutting-edge, nestled, bustling, vibrant, comprehensive guide, unlock, in today's fast-paced world, absolutely/incredibly/truly/really as filler, "Whether you're X or Y we've got you covered", "Look no further than", "From X to Y we offer it all", "your one-stop shop", "proudly offer".

Rule: Voice tells of an actual human
Detail: First-person plural (we/our/us). Mix short and long sentences. Comma splices and fragments OK if they sound like speech. Specific names beat generic phrases. Max one em-dash per piece. No exclamation marks. Real numbers from stats.md never rounded. Phone formatted with parens and dash. Lead with the answer.
Re-read before writing any customer-facing copy. If a draft doesn't pass the voice check, rewrite it.
Every fact-claim cites references/stats.md. If a number isn't in stats.md, don't write it.

Reads information_schema.columns for every table in the live schema. Compares against expected schema from shared/schema.ts. Exits process code 1 if any table/column missing. Override via ALLOW_SCHEMA_DRIFT=1 env var only for emergencies. Refuses to serve traffic against out-of-sync DB.

Every new feature table created via CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS + CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS in the boot-critical migration block BEFORE the schema-drift validator. Feature deploys don't require separate db:push step.

Rule: shared/url-lock-registry.ts lists every URL site must serve
Detail: Boot fails if any locked URL is missing from router. Prevents deletion that would break SEO equity, backlinks, customer bookmarks, Google Ads landing pages. Override only with unlock code + dated audit comment.

Two tables: system_logs (generic event firehose with level/source/category/message/details, indexed) and order_activity_logs (per-resource audit trail with action/description/performed_by/source). Admin UI to browse at /dubd43admin/activity or equivalent.
gar_visitor_id UUID format cookie. Two devices behind coffee-shop NAT don't share recall snippets. IP stored hashed-only.

Rule: Strip before persisting any user-input text
Detail: Strip phone (\b\d{3}[-.\s]?\d{3}[-.\s]?\d{4}\b), email (\b[\w.+-]+@[\w.-]+\.[a-z]{2,}\b), street addresses (number + word + city/state), ZIPs (\b\d{5}(?:-\d{4})?\b). Replace with [phone], [email], [address], [zip] tokens.

Rule: Single helper with logo + footer + sections
Detail: Hosted logo URL (NOT data: images — Gmail strips). Brand color bar. Standard footer with phone + address + business name. Optional sections: paragraphs, bullets, image-grid, CTA button, attachment. Signature: sendBrandedEmail({ to, subject, heading, paragraphs, eyebrow?, bullets?, imagesRow?, cta?, signoff?, attachment? }).

setInterval(() => syncStateFn().catch(() => {}), CHECK_INTERVAL_MS). Common: promo orchestrator (toggle flash codes), COI expiry watcher (alerts 30 days from expiry), email reconciler / abandoned-cart worker. Don't introduce separate cron infra.
Replit Object Storage, R2, or S3. URL pattern /objects/uploads/{uuid} proxied through server so underlying CDN URL never leaks and provider can rotate freely.

Homepage = LocalBusiness with Organization person founder. Product pages = Product + Offer. Category = ItemList. Service pages = Service. Blog = BlogPosting with Person author + Organization publisher. City pages = Service + Place. Use alternateName to preserve entity continuity when products are renamed.

sitemap.xml = current canonical URLs only (NOT noindex pages). robots.txt = explicit Allow/Disallow + sitemap reference. IndexNow key file at root (random 32-char filename) for Bing/Yandex push notifications.

Every page sets <link rel="canonical"> to preferred URL. 301 redirects for legacy URLs go through single registry (server/redirects.ts). Cloudflare or equivalent forces www -> apex (webhooks always use apex).

GPT-5 or equivalent. Persona has name, photo, voice. Tool-calling: search_products, check_availability, calculate_total, create_booking, send_quote, get_customer_order, get_reviews, send_owner_alert, connect_to_team. Persist conversations to {persona}_chat_messages with visitor_key, role, content, tool_calls, turn_index. Admin viewer reads each as transcript. PII scrub on stored snippets. After-hours awareness. Logged-in customer awareness. Voice rules baked into system prompt.

DB table partner_outreach with organization_name, contact_name, contact_email, contact_phone, organization_type, notes, status, initial_email_sent_at. Admin UI at /dubd43admin/partners. Per-row Send Pitch + bulk select-all + Send N pitches with confirmation + 600ms throttle. Filter chips by type. Pitch templates branch on organization_type. Optional attachment endpoint.
DB connection state, email send status (last 24 hrs + failures), cron last-run timestamps, pending background workers, API integration health (Stripe, Brevo, Twilio, GHL, etc.).

Same code path serves admin, customer, AI chat. Features: synonym map (jumper/moonwalk -> bounce house), hyphen + apostrophe normalization (Spider-Man matches "spider man"), token-AND matching ("bounce spider" matches Spider-Man Bounce), number/SKU/inflatable-number as separate code path. Never let customer search and AI search drift apart.

No error handling for impossible scenarios. No fallbacks for cases that can't happen. Validate only at system boundaries. No feature flags or backwards-compat shims when direct change works. Three similar lines beats premature abstraction. No half-finished implementations.

Only comment when WHY is non-obvious (hidden constraint, subtle invariant, workaround for a specific bug). Never explain WHAT the code does — well-named identifiers do that. Never reference the current task (no "added for ticket #123").

Topic: Type checking is a hard gate
Detail: Every site has a TypeScript baseline error count (e.g., 678 errors). Every PR's tsc count must equal or be less. Pre-commit hook blocks any commit that introduces new TS2304 (Cannot find name) errors.

Rule: For UI/frontend changes start dev server
Detail: Click through the feature, watch for regressions. Type-checking and test suites verify correctness, not feature correctness. If you can't test the UI live, say so explicitly rather than claiming success.
console.error("[module-name] description:", err.message). Fire-and-forget background jobs catch their own errors so they don't crash the request. Customer-facing errors give friendly message + phone.

Rule: docs/AGENT_HANDOFF.md updated after every significant change
Detail: Each entry: YYYY-MM-DD timestamp, what changed, why (1 sentence), anything pending or blocked.

Body: 2-4 sentence body explaining the why. Footer: Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>. Scopes: seo, outreach, partners, referrals, marketing, fix, assets, misty (or project's main feature names).

Rule: Commit when work is at clean stopping point
Detail: Push ONLY when I explicitly type "push." Never push automatically.
Never stage even if in git status: .DS_Store, node_modules/, dist/build/, .env files, dated working folders (*may 25th*, update *), personal documents (legal-letters/, income statements).

Reading prod data for lookups/audits/reports OK. NEVER mass UPDATE/DELETE without explicit owner authorization. NEVER touch product active/discount_active/quantity/price flags. NEVER commit .env. NEVER echo secrets. Ask once with concrete scope if action needs owner go-ahead.

Don't claim school-district approval if parks-only vendor. Don't claim 24/7 if business hours. Don't promise same-day — say "sometimes available, call to confirm." Use real numbers from stats.md, never round, never invent.

Agent does NOT auto-text customers or claim auto-text capability ("we'll text you back in 5 minutes" is forbidden if system can't actually send that text). Agent surfaces high-intent contacts to owner via alert; owner reaches out personally.

Weekend flash code (e.g., WEEKEND25) — server-side orchestrator toggles active=true Fri 6am-Sun midnight, false otherwise. Weekday code (e.g., WEEKDAY30) — validation checks customer's event date is Mon/Tue/Wed. Per-customer coupon grants (rebook reminders, abandoned cart) — one active coupon per customer at a time, never stacked.

DB check on signup endpoint to verify past customer. Pays via Cash App / Venmo / PayPal — not coupons or credits. Admin payout dashboard with pending/paid/declined statuses. Auto-email referrer when their friend's order is paid.

Single tool, multiple pitch templates branched by organization_type, one bulk-send button. Parks pitch = vendor-approval inquiry with COI attached. Corporate = packages + Net 30 option. Schools/churches/daycares = annual partnership pitch.

Rule: Banner shows ONLY on real promo or real calendar holiday
Detail: Real promo = weekend flash active. Real holiday = Memorial Day actual Monday, July 4, Easter via Gregorian algorithm, etc. NEVER a daily generic "look at us" banner. Use nthWeekdayOfMonth / lastWeekdayOfMonth helpers for moving holidays. Active window 00:00 to 23:59 of the actual day.

agent-assets/social-posts/{YYYY-MM-DD}-{campaign}/ per campaign. PNG + PDF versions of every graphic. Image-generation script uses the real brand logo (NOT an AI-fabricated wordmark) via editImageBuffers or equivalent.

Rule: Generic AI chatbots that don't know the business
Mass email blasts without per-recipient personalization
Detail: Use bulk-send with throttle + name substitution.
Use real database fixtures.
Read from business_settings table.
Use Tailwind or a consistent design system.
Use shadcn/ui + Tailwind.
Pick one — Drizzle, Prisma, or Sequelize — and stick with it.
Always .limit() in admin/list endpoints.
Use .with() or explicit JOIN in admin views.
Use Brevo Authorised IPs list. Local sandbox IPs change; only production server IP is reliably whitelisted.

Topic: Capture and codify per new site
Detail: Legal name, DBAs, phone (formatted), address, founding year.

Topic: Capture and codify per new site
Detail: Real name, role, voice.

Topic: Capture and codify per new site
Detail: Primary hex, accent hex, contrast pairs.

Topic: Capture and codify per new site
Detail: Sample sentences in the owner's voice.

Topic: Capture and codify per new site
Detail: Cities, counties, radius.

Topic: Capture and codify per new site
Detail: 2-sentence description suitable for LocalBusiness schema.

Topic: Capture and codify per new site
Detail: Explicit exclusions to prevent agents from over-claiming.

Topic: Capture and codify per new site
Detail: Phrases that flag a piece of copy as off-brand.

Topic: Capture and codify per new site
Detail: docs/seo-learnings/lessons/, references/, etc.

Topic: Capture and codify per new site
Detail: Initial set of user_*.md, feedback_*.md, reference_*.md files.
If I haven't authorized a destructive operation (mass UPDATE, push to main, send to >50 people), ask first.
If a feature could go either of two reasonable ways, ask which.
If you can't find a real email/fact to use, say so — don't fabricate.
If I push back on an approach, save the feedback as a memory immediately so the next agent doesn't repeat it.

Contact -> Event Details -> Review & Book. One section open at a time via expandedSection state. localStorage form key BOOKING_FORM_KEY, 30-min inactivity TTL clears stale sessions. Phone/email sanitized via cleanPhone/cleanEmail before submit. Signature in Step 3 via canvas -> SVG -> base64. Files: client/src/pages/booking.tsx, client/src/lib/cart.tsx.

Year/month/day dropdowns first. Popover + Calendar as secondary aid only. Manual prev/next-day arrow buttons (shiftDate helper). Times are Select dropdowns. Earliest bookable date enforced server-side via getEarliestBookableYmd(). Dates stored as YYYY-MM-DD strings; parsed via date-fns. Holiday check on every date change. Files: client/src/components/ui/date-picker.tsx, client/src/components/date-nav-input.tsx.

Session ID in localStorage (GRADE_A_CART_SESSION, 24h). POST /api/cart/hold creates inventoryReservation with status=cart. Heartbeat endpoint keeps hold alive; cold sessions auto-release ~15 min. /api/cart/release on clear. No deposit until full booking form + payment token POST to /api/orders. Files: client/src/lib/cart.tsx, server/routes.ts.

Square Web Payments SDK for cards. Stripe for Affirm/Klarna/Zip/Afterpay. Deposit % from business_settings, not hardcoded. Server's recomputeOrderTotals() is source of truth — never trust client math. Order transitions to confirmed only after depositPaid=true AND signature collected. No partial/retry payments auto-fired. Files: client/src/pages/booking.tsx, server/square-payments.ts, server/stripe-payments.ts.

Generators + Tables/Chairs skip buffer (same-day flip OK). All inflatables/tents/concessions need buffer. Per-product-per-date overrides via productSetupTimes table. buildVenueTimeSlotsForDate() uses buffer to block overlapping venue slots. Files: server/routes.ts (productNeedsTurnaroundBuffer), shared/schema.ts, server/venue-scheduling.ts.

Rule: Draft has quoteToken UUID; conversion creates NEW order
Detail: Resume URL /booking/resume/:token restores cart + form. Line items, orderPackages, bannerThemeId, coupons all copy directly. Archive old draft (archiveReason + archiveTime) only AFTER conversion succeeds. Pre-2026-05-24 bug dropped packages/banner on conversion — fixed. Files: server/routes.ts (/api/booking/resume, /api/quotes/resume).

Per-customer grants checked FIRST (referral/employee), then global promo_codes table. hasPackages=true rejects code — promos do NOT stack with packages. Overnight fee ($75) NOT taxed. Auto-toggle flash codes (WEEKEND25, WEEKDAY30) flipped via server-side orchestrator + business_settings flags. Files: server/routes.ts (POST /api/validate-promo), server/coupon-grants.ts.

nthWeekdayOfMonth, lastWeekdayOfMonth, Easter algorithm. Banner shows ONLY on real promo or real holiday — never daily generic. Active window 00:00-23:59 of actual day; don't use activeDaysBefore/After to creep. getShiftedDates(eventDate, deliveryOffset, pickupOffset) defaults -1/+1 day. Files: shared/holiday-utils.ts, client/src/components/seasonal-experience.tsx.

Statuses: pending -> in-transit -> arrived -> completed | skipped. autoAttachOrderToTruck() fires on order status=active. syncTruckAssignmentsOnScheduledDateChange() re-runs route opt on date change. Skip feature jumps ahead; server auto-restores skipped stops on complete. GPS pings in gpsTrackingPings. Load checklist uses customer-facing inflatable number, NOT internal product_id. Files: server/driver-routes.ts, server/utils/order-date-sync.ts.

Quick-book SKIPS overnight detection, holiday shift, dayBefore flag, signature, setupSurface. Quick-book creates orders with status=pending directly. Customer self-serve signature link sent afterwards if needed. Quick-quote generates PDF via /api/quotes/generate-pdf without touching payment. Files: client/src/pages/admin-quick-booking.tsx, client/src/pages/admin-quick-quote.tsx.

Guest checkout always allowed (email-only lookup via cleanEmail). Loyalty tracked in customers.loyaltyPoints + loyaltyTier. Re-engagement events logged to reactivationLogs. /resume-booking?token=X restores prior cart. No algorithmic suggested-items — let customer pick. Files: client/src/pages/account.tsx, server/routes.ts (/api/orders).

Never throws — logs to console on failure but never breaks the underlying mutation. actorFromReq(req) extracts username/email, falls back to system. Common actions: order_updated, pickup_removed, date_moved, discount_applied, payment_refunded. Admin viewer /dubd43admin/activity. Agents query this BEFORE asking what happened. Files: server/system-logger.ts, shared/schema.ts (orderActivityLogs).

Cart UI displays packages separately from line items. recomputeOrderTotals() expands packages into virtual order_items with productId=null + lineNote="from package X". Cart shows "Promo codes don't stack with packages" when both present. Recompute on submit catches stale bundle math. Files: shared/schema.ts (packages, packageItems, orderPackages).

Rule: Parallel bannerThemes table with synthetic cart addon
Detail: Joined to order via orderBannerTheme. Cart shows synthetic CartItem with isBannerAddon=true (visible in totals, not sent as product). Banner fee was wiped by recompute pre-2026-05-24 — fixed by excluding from recompute. proofApprovedAt + printedAt track production state. Files: shared/schema.ts (bannerThemes, orderBannerTheme), client/src/pages/booking.tsx.

Rule: Places API max 5 texts; manual import for the rest
Detail: Real review_count stored as separate business setting — never claim the Places-API count as full. Manual import accepts paste blocks or CSV (name, text, rating, date). ReviewCarousel rotates on homepage. gbp-reviews-sync cron worker pulls Places API on schedule. Files: server/routes.ts (gbp-reviews-sync), client/src/pages/admin-settings.tsx (Social Media tab).

Two dates surfaced: publishedAt (never changes once set) and updatedAt (refreshed on every edit). Hero = real product photo by default; AI image only on explicit request. JSON-LD BlogPosting schema with Person author + Organization publisher. AI image gen via generateImageBuffer (OpenAI gpt-image-1, Render-only API key). Files: server/blog-routes.ts, client/src/pages/blog.tsx, client/src/pages/blog-post.tsx.

Slug must match canonical (e.g., dade-city 301s to dade-city-fl). Rich pages get neighborhoods, HOA rules, parks, lot sizes, local landmarks from real photos owner took. Synthetic pages use unique nearby-landmark + top-3-neighborhood + FAQ rotation to stay >=30% unique vs siblings. lastUpdated bumps only on content change. Files: server/rich-city-pages.ts, server/routes.ts (/api/seo/city-pages/:slug), client/src/pages/location.tsx.

Rule: DB templates fired on order status transitions
Detail: Lifecycle: draft->pending (confirmation), pending->confirmed (payment received), confirmed->delivered (all set), balance reminder every 3 days until paid. Templates in quick_emails table; parameters: {{ customerName }}, {{ orderNumber }}, {{ totalAmount }}. Every send uses branded HTML template with logo header. Logged to emailLogs. Brevo IP-whitelisted (Render only). Opt-out flips customers.emailOptOut. Files: server/services/quick-emails.ts, server/services/notifications.ts.

Memory persisted to misty_chat_messages (visitor_key, role, content, turn_index). 1-year cookie or hashed IP. GPT-5 default; 50-message history, 4000 output tokens. Intent expansion maps soft queries (boy/girl/pink/superhero) to product tags. Greeting includes holiday detection. PII scrubbed before storage. Same product-search matcher as customer-facing search — never drift. Read-only Q&A. Files: server/ai-chat.ts, server/agents/index.ts, client/src/pages/chat.tsx.

Rule: partner_outreach + admin UI + branched pitch templates
Detail: Status enum: not_contacted | contacted | replied | link_placed | rejected. Templates branched on organization_type (parks/corporate/schools/churches/daycares). Bulk select-all + send-N with 600ms throttle. COI send button for orgs needing insurance attachment. Pitch templates pre-seeded in server/production-migration.ts. Files: shared/schema.ts (partnerOutreach), client/src/pages/admin-partners.tsx, client/src/pages/admin-backlink-outreach.tsx.

Rule: localStorage for session, server for authority
Detail: Never trust client math on pricing, availability, totals. localStorage for resumability; server-side validation for truth.
Order, driver stop, outreach, payment all use string enums with explicit allowed transitions. No booleans for multi-state lifecycle.
Activity, email, system logs catch + console.error so the request that triggered them never fails.
Customer search, admin search, AI chat all use ONE shared code path. Drift between them is a bug.
Year/month/day dropdowns load faster, work on every device, convert better than visual calendars for booking flows.

Rule: One coupon per customer at a time
Detail: No stacking. No simultaneous grant + global code. Always validate against hasPackages first.

Rule: One bundled PR over many tiny ones
Detail: Per Dominic's feedback: for refactors in an area, prefer one bundled PR over splitting into many small ones (avoids churn).
